metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skills for databases, prompts, TDD, planning, and writing

plugins.name: pm-database-designer
plugins.description: Design database schemas, plan migrations, optimize queries, choose between SQL and NoSQL

plugins.name: pm-humanizer
plugins.description: Remove AI writing patterns and make text sound natural and human-written

plugins.name: pm-planning
plugins.description: File-based planning for complex multi-step tasks with persistent markdown tracking

plugins.name: pm-prompt-engineer
plugins.description: Design, optimize, and evaluate LLM prompts with structured output schemas and test suites

plugins.name: pm-prompt-master
plugins.description: Generate optimized ready-to-paste prompts for any AI tool

plugins.name: pm-prompt-toolkit
plugins.description: A/B test, version, and manage prompts for production with regression safety

plugins.name: pm-skill-improver
plugins.description: Iteratively review and fix Claude Code skill quality issues

plugins.name: pm-tdd
plugins.description: Test-driven development with red-green-refactor workflows across Jest, Pytest, JUnit, Vitest
